description: Perform a Confirmatory Factor Analysis (CFA) and measurement invariance test using the 'lavaan' package on the 'HolzingerSwineford1939' dataset. The model includes three factors: Visual (x1, x2, x3), Textual (x4, x5, x6), and Speed (x7, x8, x9). Save the CFA fit statistics (CFI, TLI, RMSEA, SRMR) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/cfa_fit_statistics.csv with columns 'statistic' and 'value'. Save standardized factor loadings to /home/ga/RProjects/output/cfa_factor_loadings.csv with columns 'latent_factor', 'indicator', and 'std_loading'. Conduct measurement invariance testing (Configural, Metric, and Scalar) across 'school' groups, exporting results (model, cfi, rmsea, chisq, df) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/measurement_invariance.csv. Generate a path diagram saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/cfa_path_diagram.png and save the R script to /home/ga/RProjects/sem_analysis.R.
